zh.Towcester, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特
zh.Writtle, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可萊特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Empson於1470年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特時，她的父親Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy20歲，母親Jane de Plumpton25歲。她於1484年與Edward Bulstrode在英國米德萊可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1510年5月12日在英國英格蘭享年40歲。

zh-hans.Towcester, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特
zh-hans.Writtle, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可萊特爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Empson于1470年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特时，她的父亲Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy20岁，母亲Jane de Plumpton25岁。她于1484年与Edward Bulstrode在英国米德萊可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1510年5月12日在英国英格兰享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Empson was born in 1470, in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, was 20 and her mother, Jane de Plumpton, was 25. She married Edward Bulstrode in 1484, in Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 12 May 1510, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Empson est née en 1470, à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jane de Plumpton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Bulstrode en 1484, à Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1510, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Empson 1470 in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy 20 und ihre Mutter Jane de Plumpton 25. Sie hat 1484 in Middlesex, England Edward Bulstrode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1510 im Alter von 40 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Empson è nata il nel 1470 nel Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Jane de Plumpton, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Edward Bulstrode nel 1484, nel Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 maggio 1510, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Empsonが1470年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchyは20歳，母Jane de Plumptonは25歳であった。1484年にイギリスミッドレセックスでEdward Bulstrodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1510年5月12日にイギリスイギリスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Empson(이)가 1470년 영국 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane de Plumpton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 미들레세스에서 Edward Bulstrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Writtle, Essex, England: Writtle, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Empson nasceu em 1470, em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Plumpton, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Bulstrode em 1484, em Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1510, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Empson родилась в 1470 г. в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Plumpton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Bulstrode в 1484 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 12 мая 1510 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Empson nació en 1470, en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Empson Chancellor of the Duchy, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Jane de Plumpton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Edward Bulstrode en 1484, en Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1510, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
